summary: Visual Editor (Phase 2B) testing complete. All 5 features pass - page load, game data display, question editing, spec update API, and save functionality all working correctly.

1_visual_editor_page_load.details: Navigate to /studio/:gameId loads StudioEditor correctly with data-testid='studio-editor-page'

2_game_data_display.details: Editor shows game title ('Test Math Game'), type badge ('Quiz'), question count (2), and Live Preview with questions

3_question_editing.details: Questions expand on click, text fields are editable (stem, options, difficulty, explanation, hints). 'Unsaved changes' badge appears on edit.

4_spec_update_api.details: PUT /api/games/:gameId/spec correctly updates game spec, returns updated game with incremented spec_version. 8/8 pytest tests passed.

5_save_button.details: Save Game button enables when changes made, clicking saves to database, shows 'Game saved!' toast, button disables after save.

seed_data_creation: Test game already exists from previous testing. Game restored to original state after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual Editor feature complete. StudioEditor.jsx and LivePreview.jsx working correctly. Test game has 2 math questions. AI refine feature cannot be tested due to budget limits.
